scripts.refresh:core: cd packages/@randsum/core && bun install && bun run build
scripts.refresh:dice: cd packages/@randsum/dice && bun install && bun update && bun run build
scripts.refresh:notation: cd packages/@randsum/notation && bun install && bun update && bun run build
scripts.refresh:tower: cd packages/@randsum/tower && bun install && bun update && bun run build
scripts.refresh:customdice: cd packages/@randsum/customdice && bun install && bun update && bun run build
scripts.refresh:games: cd packages/@randsum/games && bun install && bun update && bun run build
scripts.refresh:all: bun refresh:core && bun refresh:dice && bun refresh:notation && bun refresh:tower && bun refresh:customdice && bun refresh:games
